profile.channel_mismatch_note: HQ and primary technology decision-making in Houston — fully within WWT STOLA territory. No channel conflict.

signals.signal_title: AI Center of Excellence (AICOE) with VC-style use case funding model
signals.signal_description: ConocoPhillips operates an internal AI Center of Excellence using a venture-capital-style funding model to evaluate and deploy AI use cases across operations. Artificial gas lift optimization runs on thousands of wells daily. CDIO Pragati Mathur leads AI/digital strategy. Won 2025 HoustonCIO National ORBIE Super Global.

signals.signal_title: Global Well Data Warehouse (GWDW) — ~1 billion rows, foundation for all ML/AI
signals.signal_description: COP's Global Well Data Warehouse contains approximately 1 billion rows of well data and serves as the foundation for all machine learning and AI initiatives including artificial gas lift optimization, predictive maintenance, and the DrillBET back-reaming efficiency tool.

signals.signal_title: Global Digital Twin Program on Microsoft Azure — visualization, monitoring, simulation tiers
signals.signal_description: ConocoPhillips has deployed a multi-tier Global Digital Twin Program on Microsoft Azure spanning visualization, real-time monitoring, and full physics simulation. Azure confirmed as primary cloud platform alongside Microsoft Teams for collaboration.

signals.signal_title: Completed $22.5B acquisition of Marathon Oil — IT integration underway
signals.signal_description: ConocoPhillips closed its $22.5B acquisition of Marathon Oil on November 22, 2024. Marathon's well and production data is being integrated into the Global Well Data Warehouse (GWDW). IT integration demand is elevated across infrastructure, OT, and data platforms.

signals.signal_title: 20-25% workforce reduction announced — accelerating automation and AI investment
signals.signal_description: ConocoPhillips announced a 20-25% workforce reduction in September 2025 as part of post-Marathon integration restructuring. Workforce consolidation is accelerating investment in automation, AI-driven operations, and digital tools to maintain production efficiency with a leaner headcount.
